title: Original Netherite Tool Recipes
description: No Smithing Table Required! An easier way to get Netherite Tools. Shapeless.
body:
# Original Netherite Tool Recipes

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

20w06a; Added netherite tools, armor, blocks, ingots, etc. 20w10a; Netherite gear are now created through a smithing table.

When tools were first added you only needed your diamond tool and 1 netherite ingot in your crafting table to make your netherite tool.

- 1 diamond axe + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite axe 
- 1 diamond hoe + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite hoe
- 1 diamond pickaxe + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite pickaxe 
- 1 diamond shovel + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite shovel 
- 1 diamond sword + 1 netherite in any combo = netherite sword

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.16-1.20

![shapeless recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e5ce44579e54ed20f106b69027454e9d8154102.png)
